annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest on judgments and decrees, set quarterly by the Florida Chief Financial Officer under Fla. Stat. §55.03 (12-month average of the New York Fed discount/primary-credit rate + 4 percentage points) — currently 8.06% for the quarter beginning July 1, 2026. Simple interest; a judgment’s rate re-adjusts each January 1 to the then-current CFO rate (§55.03(3)). Verify the current quarter at myfloridacfo.com; not legal advice.
